documentation.description:
Sets a desired vehicle position in a local north-east-down coordinate
frame. Used by an external controller to command the vehicle (manual
controller or other system).

record_types.name: Set_Position_Target_Local_Ned

fields.name: Coordinate_Frame
fields.description:
Valid options are: MAV_FRAME_LOCAL_NED = 1,
MAV_FRAME_LOCAL_OFFSET_NED = 7, MAV_FRAME_BODY_NED = 8,
MAV_FRAME_BODY_OFFSET_NED = 9

fields.name: Type_Mask
fields.description:
Bitmap to indicate which dimensions should be ignored by the
vehicle.

fields.name: X
fields.description:
Units: [m]
X Position in NED frame

fields.name: Y
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Y Position in NED frame

fields.name: Z
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Z Position in NED frame (note, altitude is negative in NED)

fields.name: Vx
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
X velocity in NED frame

fields.name: Vy
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Y velocity in NED frame

fields.name: Vz
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Z velocity in NED frame

fields.name: Afx
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
X acceleration or force (if bit 10 of type_mask is set) in NED frame
in meter / s^2 or N

fields.name: Afy
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Y acceleration or force (if bit 10 of type_mask is set) in NED frame
in meter / s^2 or N

fields.name: Afz
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Z acceleration or force (if bit 10 of type_mask is set) in NED frame
in meter / s^2 or N

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Check_CRC

  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

documentation.description: Put the message in the buffer ready for send
